title: Urgent Care Centers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Urgent Care Centers 60 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness ADVENTIST HEALTH ADVENTIST HEALTH PRIMARY CARE VERNONIA URGENT CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides walk-in treatment services for people who have minor illnesses or injuries. Urgent care centers serve as an alternative to hospital emergency departments. 1620 East 12th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 9am-7pm (541) 506-5880 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL CITY CONCERN OLD TOWN CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Old Town Clinic offers a patient-centered primary care. Services include: care for acute and chronic illnesses, women's health services, such as PAPS, pelvic exams, and breast exams, behavioral healthcare evaluation, substance abuse assessment, naturopathic and acupuncture services. Also offers a variety of wellness programs and activities available to patients, such as yoga. Urgent care for established patients. The pharmacy provides medication education and therapy management, as well as anticoagulation therapy management to current clients. 726 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Clinic hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 9am-5pm Pharmacy hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8:30am-5:30, Wednesday 9:30am-5:30pm Email (503) 228-4533 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COLUMBIA MEMORIAL HOSPITAL ASTORIA HEALTH AND WELLNESS PAVILION COLUMBIA MEMORIAL URGENT CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment for minor illnesses or injuries that do not require hospitalization but need direct attention. 2265 Exchange Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 9am-6:30pm. Immunizations for seasonal flu and Tdap (tetanus, whooping cough) are also available. 945 Washington Way Suite 141 Longview, WA 98632 Eligibility: Uninsured adults age 18 and older Hours: Tuesday 9am-noon, Wednesday 5pm-8pm, Thursday noon-3pm Email (360) 442-4165 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOOD SHEPHERD HEALTH CARE SYSTEM GOOD SHEPHERD URGENT CARE URGENT CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides walk-in treatment services for urgent health care needs that are not life-threatening, including care for minor injuries and fractures, sprains and strains, allergies and asthma, cold and flu symptoms, cuts and abrasions, urinary symptoms, minor eye injuries, pink eye, earaches, burn care, and skin rashes and conditions. Also offers sports physicals, EKGs, vaccinations and immunizations, sutures and stitches, and on-site medications. 1050 W Elm Avenue Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per
